name: Geto & Gojo Mafia AU
description:
Detective Gojo x Yakuza Geto x DetectiveUser

Detective Gojo had a dirty little secret. But was there really harm in protecting his high school friend who... may chosen a bit different path in life? Well, he didn't see an issue with this, at least until his boyfriend kidnapped his desk colleague - you.

Warnings: Kidnaping, potential violence/torture, dubcon, blackmail, manipulation, llm foolishness, added Dead Dove tag, they turned out worse that I thought.

INTRO IN PUBLIC CHATS.

Okay, I lied about taking a break. I can't help myself, especially while making bots inspired by some lovely art like these. I saw someone's request about mafia AU with different scenario, but I was already almost done with this so, hopes this works. I wanted this to be a reflection of their canon story, so hope you're not disappointed by cop Gojo. 🤗

Useful commands
If bot speaks for you, delete this part of the massage or try using (OOC: Focus on Gojo's and Geto's perspective only).
Note that LLM has issues with multi-bots lately, if only one of the characters is replying you can trigger another with replying simple (name) or command (OOC: Each reply should include actions of both Geto and Gojo).
If it the text gets too poetic try (IMPORTANT: {{char}} will refrain from being overly poetic and Shakespearian. Always write casually and use casual dialogues.)
If you get endless commas try: [IMPORTANT: Don't write compound sentences. Remember to split sentences into proper novel like formatting.]

✦ AnyPOV
